things.name: Diocletian's Palace
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 4th-century Roman emperor's retirement palace, still a living city

things.name: Cathedral of Saint Domnius
things.description: World's oldest Catholic cathedral, converted from Diocletian's mausoleum

things.name: Marjan Hill
things.description: Forested peninsula park above the city with viewpoints and secluded beaches

things.name: Mestrovic Gallery
things.description: Sculptor Ivan Mestrovic's villa museum with one of Croatia's finest art collections

things.name: Riva Promenade
things.description: Bustling waterfront promenade, the social heart of Split with palm trees and cafes

things.name: Klis Fortress
things.description: Dramatic hilltop fortress above Split, Game of Thrones filming location

things.name: Golden Gate
things.description: Best-preserved Roman gate of Diocletian's Palace with the Grgur Ninski statue

things.name: Krka National Park
things.description: Stunning series of waterfalls and lakes accessible by boat from Sibenik

things.name: Hvar Island Day Trip
things.description: Glamorous Adriatic island with lavender fields, crystal water and vibrant nightlife

things.name: Brac Island & Zlatni Rat
things.description: Day trip to the famous horn-shaped pebble beach that shifts with the current
